name: Will Byers
description:
“Tell me more..”

Will finally gets a rotary phone, the use he finds for it is mildly unconventional.

✧ NSFW intro, implied MikePOV but it's not explicitly stated.

✧ CW: Will does NOT disclose what he's doing on the other end of the phone, so User is kind of in the dark. If that's not your forte I don't suggest this bot lol

A/N

I'm not gonna lie bro this idea has been permeating in my head for a while and I NEEDEDDDD to get it down.. Vampire Mike bot at some point guys stay tuned

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+
